name: icecode
description: AI coding agent in your terminal

scripts.preuninstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const os = require('os'); const configDir = path.join(os.homedir(), '.config', 'icecode'); const binaryPath = path.join(configDir, process.platform === 'win32' ? 'icecode.exe' : 'icecode'); const metadataPath = path.join(configDir, 'icecode-metadata.json'); try { fs.unlinkSync(binaryPath) } catch (e) { /* ignore if file doesn't exist */ } try { fs.unlinkSync(metadataPath) } catch (e) { /* ignore if file doesn't exist */ }"
